title: Zigbee Door & window sensor

diagComments.excerpt:
Hi! 👋

This device is **already supported** in [dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee) (Tuya Unified Zigbee fork) — **v5.11.14** with 138 drivers and 5,579+ fingerprints.

**Install the latest test version:**
https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/

**Community forum for support:**
https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352

After installing, delete and re-pair your device. If it still doesn't work, please share a **diagnostic report ID** (device Settings > Create diagnostic report) and a **Homey Developer Tools interview** (https://tools.developer.homey.app).

<!-- tuya-triage-bot -->
Hi! This device is **already supported** in the [Tuya Unified Zigbee fork](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee) v5.11.13 (102 drivers, 29000+ fingerprints).

- `_TZ3000_zutizvyk` -> **contact_sensor** driver

**Install:** https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/

After installing, delete and re-pair your device. If issues persist, share a diagnostic report ID on the [test forum](https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352).

aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue, here is the extracted structured device information:

## Device Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Device Name** | Zigbee Door & window sensor |
| **ManufacturerName** | `_TZ3000_zutizvyk` |
| **ProductId (ModelId)** | `TS0203` |
| **Full Fingerprint** | `_TZ3000_zutizvyk` + `TS0203` |
| **Device Type** | Contact Sensor (Door/Window) |
| **ApplicationDeviceId** | 1026 (IAS Zone) |
| **Endpoint** | 1 |

## Clusters Found

| Cluster ID | Cluster Name | Key Attributes |
|------------|--------------|----------------|
| 0x0000 | Basic | - |
| 0x0001 | PowerConfiguration | batteryVoltage=30 (3.0V), batteryPercentageRemaining=200 (100%) |
| 0x0003 | Identify | - |
| 0x0500 | IAS Zone | (motion/contact zone) |

## Capabilities Expected

Based on the clusters:
- **alarm_contact** (from IAS Zone - zone type for contact)
- **measure_battery** (from PowerConfiguration)
- **alarm_battery** (low battery alert)

## Status

- **Supported**: ✅ YES - This device is already supported
- **Driver**: `contact_sensor` (or `motion_sensor` depending on zone type)
- **Issue**: User reports it shows as "Generic Zigbee Device" - likely needs re-pairing after app update, or the fingerprint needs to be added to the driver's `driver.compose.json`

## Action Required

1. **Check if fingerprint exists**: Verify `_TZ3000_zutizvyk` + `TS0203` is in `contact_sensor/driver.compose.json`
2. **If missing**: Add the fingerprint to the driver
3. **User instructions**: Tell user to update the app, re-pair the device, and it should be recognized as a contact sensor
